name: Choppie's
short_description: A horror game where you have to escape a restaurant from a killer rabbit that has got a really sharp arm. Will you chicken out or face your fears?
detailed_description:
It is a story about a character called "John" whose only goal is to meet his friend in an abandoned restaurant, when he enters the restaurant, a rabbit comes up and ruins all his plans.

In this single-player experience, you play as John as you navigate and conquer the challenges thrown at

you in this restaurant. Explore the old restaurant! The further you go, the more you know! Solve puzzles, read notes, and find out what's in the lab! But you are not alone. The rabbit mascot Choppie is on the loose and it's up to you to survive the nightmare.

Will you escape or will you find the truth about this place?

Play more and more as time goes on!

Buy the game and get all the other chapters for free.
